title: Sheet Metal Missing Bend Relief at Inside Corner

inputs.description: Sheet metal channel drawing showing a flat pattern and a formed U-channel view. Material: AISI 1008 CRS, t=1.5mm, general bend radius 2.5mm. The left flange bend lines show small bend relief notches at the inside corners. The right flange bend line meets the main body at a sharp inside corner with no bend relief cut. Detail B (scale 5:1) shows the right inside corner as 'R0 (NO RELIEF CUT)'. A bend table lists both flanges at 90 degrees, R=2.5mm, K=0.44.

prompt: What is the manufacturability concern with this sheet metal part, and what is the standard corrective action? One sentence.
correct_answer_summary: The inside corner at the right flange lacks a bend relief slot, which will cause the material to tear or crack at the bend termination during forming; the standard fix is to add a rectangular or radius relief slot at least equal to the material thickness in width and the bend radius in depth at both inside corners of that flange.

rubric.item: Identifies the absence of a bend relief cut at the right flange inside corner as the manufacturability concern.
rubric.rationale: The detail callout makes this somewhat visible, but the model must read 'R0 NO RELIEF CUT' correctly and understand its implication.

rubric.item: States that the consequence of the missing relief is material tearing, cracking, or distortion at the bend terminus during forming.
rubric.rationale: Requires domain knowledge about what happens without relief. A common engineering fact but the exact consequence (tearing vs. cracking vs. generic 'defect') is nuanced.

rubric.item: Recommends adding a relief slot (rectangular or radius cut) at the inside corner as the corrective action.
rubric.rationale: The standard fix is well-known; models with sheet metal knowledge should recommend it.

rubric.item: Does NOT flag the left flange as having the missing relief (the left flange does have relief cuts shown).
rubric.rationale: Guard against mis-identifying which flange has the defect. Left flange notches are drawn but are small and easy to miss.

rubric.item: Does NOT claim the bend radius or K-factor values in the bend table are incorrect (they are consistent with the material spec).
rubric.rationale: K=0.44 and R=2.5mm are reasonable for t=1.5mm CRS. Distractor guard.

qa_status.note: Run qa_runner.py with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set to populate pass counts.
